## Source: amazon-inspector (ec575fc86c9df0e6b2ab1a970a32ecf46d6c83971e173f481ecf7e87184260a9)
The package @athena-ui-components/axios was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (e22f59896f2de4c3b32226de5b31eb780a415fa89db6933fc70b910aa4e2f525)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@athena-ui-components/axios' @ 0.8.17 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
